overview: Scale Up is a high-converting digital agency website built to generate leads and rank on Google. It features 5 fully responsive pages with Electric Blue branding on a deep black background, animated logo, sticky WhatsApp CTA, smooth scroll animations, and full SEO optimization targeting Kerala businesses.
features: Animated Scale Up hero with electric blue glow effects
5 pages: Home, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact
Sticky WhatsApp floating button on all pages
Home page with metrics counters, process steps, testimonials carousel
Services page with detailed benefits and CTAs per service
SEO meta tags, H1/H2 hierarchy, schema markup for Kerala keywords
Smooth scroll fade-in animations using Motion library
Contact form with WhatsApp primary CTA
